seo.title: YouTube Shorts Downloader – Download Shorts Videos | Y2Mate
seo.meta_description: YouTube Shorts Downloader lets you download Shorts videos in the correct vertical 9:16 format. No rotation issues, no watermark, works directly in your browser.

hero.h1: YouTube Shorts Downloader – Download Shorts Videos in Vertical Format

intro: The YouTube Shorts Downloader from Y2Mate is built specifically for downloading short-form Shorts videos from YouTube.

Shorts are fundamentally different from regular YouTube videos in terms of duration, aspect ratio, and playback behavior. Downloading Shorts requires a dedicated handling process to avoid display issues.

sections.h2: Why Do YouTube Shorts Downloads Often Fail?
content: Many video download tools do not distinguish between Shorts videos and standard long-form YouTube videos.
As a result, Shorts videos may download with common issues such as horizontal rotation, missing audio, or incorrect aspect ratios.
When you paste a Shorts video link, the system detects it as short-form content and applies a dedicated processing method designed for vertical videos.
This approach helps ensure faster downloads and reduces playback issues across different devices.

sections.h2: Preserve the Original Vertical Aspect Ratio
content: Downloaded Shorts videos keep the same vertical aspect ratio as they appear on YouTube. The video is not rotated or cropped.
This makes Shorts videos suitable for replay on mobile devices or for personal offline use.

sections.h2: How Shorts Differ from Regular YouTube Videos
content: YouTube Shorts are short, vertical videos, while regular YouTube videos are typically horizontal and longer in duration.
If you need to download long-form YouTube videos for offline viewing, you can use the YouTube to MP4 tool or visit Download Video YouTube to explore other download options.

sections.h2: Frequently Asked Questions About YouTube Shorts

faqs.question: Is there a download limit for YouTube Shorts?
faqs.answer: No. You can download YouTube Shorts without a fixed daily or usage limit.

faqs.question: How do I save a YouTube Short on my phone?
faqs.answer: On Android, the downloaded Short will appear in your Downloads folder or Gallery. On iPhone, use Safari to download the video, then save it from the Downloads section to Photos.

faqs.question: Can I download Shorts with sound?
faqs.answer: Yes. Shorts are downloaded with their original audio if the source video includes sound.

faqs.question: Why are Shorts processed faster than normal YouTube videos?
faqs.answer: Shorts are shorter in duration and use a different format, allowing the system to analyze and prepare the file more quickly.

faqs.question: Will the downloaded Short keep its vertical format?
faqs.answer: Yes. The tool preserves the original vertical aspect ratio so the video displays correctly on mobile devices.

faqs.question: How should downloaded Shorts be used?
faqs.answer: Downloaded Shorts are intended for personal use, such as offline viewing or saving. Users are responsible for respecting the rights of the original content creators.
